headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://conversations-widget.brevo.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://conversations-widget.brevo.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://conversations-widget.brevo.com; connect-src 'self' https://conversations-widget.brevo.com wss://conversations-widget.brevo.com https://*.brevo.com; frame-src https://conversations-widget.brevo.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self'
